label-mono.purpose: Eyebrows, trust lines, section markers. JetBrains Mono, tracked.

data-mono.purpose: KPI and proof-band numbers. Always monospace.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Only ambient elevation. Cards, panels, sticky bars.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default state transitions and reveals (ease-out-quint feel). No bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action across the app — solid indigo, deepens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform .18s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,.45); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Brand CTA Button
components.description: Marketing-surface CTA — the indigo→cyan FILL gradient (not text gradient).
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #06b6d4); color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter .18s, transform .18s; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { filter: brightness(1.06); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(34,211,238,.45); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Sunken at rest, lifts to white with a tool-accent focus ring (indigo shown).
components.css: .ds-input { background: #f8fafc; color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: background .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #6366f1; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat white panel on the sunken page, 1px hairline, shadow-sm only.
components.html:
Wasted spend

Terms costing money with zero orders.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.05); padding: 24px; } .ds-card-t { margin: 0 0 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-b { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #64748b; }

components.name: KPI Readout
components.description: The signature data-instrument readout — mono number over a tracked mono label.
components.html: $37,840// total ad spend
components.css: .ds-kpi { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-kpi-n { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-weight: 900; font-size: 30px; line-height: 1; color: #0f172a; } .ds-kpi-l { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: lowercase; color: #94a3b8; }

narrative.overview: PPCBench looks like a precision tool, not a brochure. The reference object is a measuring instrument — an oscilloscope, a trading terminal, a lab notebook — where every mark on the surface earns its place by carrying information. The signature is Inter for substance paired with JetBrains Mono as the instrument's readout layer: eyebrows, trust lines, KPI numbers, and section markers are mono, so the interface reads as calibrated rather than decorated. It rejects the generic-SaaS monoculture, the cluttered default-dashboard look, enterprise navy-and-gray brochureware, and playful-consumer pastel.
keyCharacteristics: Monospace as a functional readout layer (numbers, labels, markers), not decoration.
A restrained white/slate surface, with color reserved for meaning.
A three-channel signal palette: profit (emerald), waste (rose), neutral/brand (indigo→cyan).
Quiet, custom-themed data viz; never default Chart.js.
Calm by default; motion and color appear only to carry state or meaning.

rules.name: The Signal-Reserve Rule
rules.body: Emerald and rose are reserved for meaning — profit and waste. Never decorative. Green means 'making money', red means 'bleeding money'.

rules.name: The Wordmark Exception Rule
rules.body: Gradient-clipped text is permitted only on the 'Bench' in the wordmark and one hero accent phrase. Forbidden everywhere else.

rules.name: The Mono-Readout Rule
rules.body: Every reported number is JetBrains Mono; prose is Inter. The split is the brand.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest, separated by 1px #e2e8f0 hairlines. Elevation responds to state, never decorates.

dos: Do set every reported number in JetBrains Mono and every paragraph in Inter.
Do reserve emerald and rose for profit and waste only.
Do keep surfaces flat, separated by 1px #e2e8f0 hairlines.
Do tint each tool's input focus ring to that tool's accent (indigo / rose / cyan).
Do verify body text hits >=4.5:1 contrast.
Do keep charts quiet and custom-themed; thin doughnuts, gradient bars, dark tooltip.
donts: Don't ship the generic-SaaS look: Inter-with-a-purple-gradient-on-everything, cards nested in cards, icon tile above every heading, tracked eyebrow on every section.
Don't use gradient-clipped text anywhere except the wordmark and one hero accent phrase.
Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe; feature accents go on the top edge only.
Don't let charts default to raw Chart.js styling or pile every metric on with equal weight.
Don't drift toward enterprise navy-and-gray or playful-consumer pastel/mascot/emoji.
Don't convey good/waste/high-ACOS by color alone; always pair with label or position.
